emails.subject: Annual Conference Invitation
emails.body:
Hi Emma,

Please send the following event invitation to our events mailing list:

Subject: You're Invited - Annual Company Conference 2024!

Dear Colleague,

We are excited to invite you to our Annual Company Conference!

Date: March 15-17, 2024
Location: Grand Convention Center
Theme: Innovation & Growth

Highlights:
- Keynote speakers
- Networking sessions
- Product demos

RSVP by February 28th.

Best regards,
Events Team
